title: Grilled Ukrainian BBQ Ribs
description: A twist on traditional BBQ ribs, this recipe brings a Ukrainian flavor profile to the grill.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix Ukrainian spices and 1 tablespoon of malty BBQ sauce.
Apply spice mixture to pork ribs, making sure to coat evenly.
Place ribs on grill, close lid, and smoke for 2 hours.
After 2 hours, increase grill temperature to 375°F (190°C).
Brush ribs with remaining malty BBQ sauce.
Grill for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until caramelized.
Serve with crunchy coleslaw and additional BBQ sauce, if desired.
